message:
refactor(e2e): bundle canonical rewrite inputs for benchmark matrix

The complete_benchmark_matrix integration test was carrying a long,
repetition-prone parameter list through rewrite_jsonl_with_canonical_records().
That made the canonical record rewrite path harder to follow and easy to break
whenever the provenance bundle needed one more shared input.

Introduce CanonicalRewriteContext to group the shared rewrite inputs:
- command arguments
- repo root
- campaign selection
- source revision
- beads data hash
- run id

Then thread that context through the canonical JSONL rewrite helper instead of
passing six parallel arguments at every callsite. The behavior is unchanged,
but the provenance plumbing is now explicit, less repetitive, and easier to
extend without desynchronizing the two canonical rewrite branches.
